productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Dirt Rider Grey Shirt
description: CompositionBlack and white checked shirt with pink highlights made of 100% cotton, has a narrow spread collar, a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with two button cuffs and mid arm buttoned tab, Western style yoked back, top-stitched decoration on front, pocket with branding on left chest and a curved hemFitSlimWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its cowboy style features will give you a dashing air. The mid arm tabs on the sleeves mean you can roll them up when the weather gets warmer, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
